title: bumelia lycioides var. reclinata
intro: Bumelia lycioides var. reclinata, also known as the reclinata bumelia or reclinata tree, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is native to the Americas and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bumelia lycioides var. reclinata include the potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions due to its antipyretic and analgesic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it has been traditionally used by indigenous communities in the Americas for its medicinal and spiritual properties.
